elements.subsection-2411-026: Coarse constructions and topological overlap of horocyclic products of trees
elements.sent-2411-618: We give the definition of a horocyclic product of trees.
elements.sent-2411-619: Let $T$ denote the infinite $3$-regular tree, fix some $v\in VT$ and $\eta\in\partial_\infty T$.
elements.sent-2411-620: For each $x$ let $\gamma_x$ denote the unique geodesic ray starting at $x$ with boundary point $\eta$.. We define \begin{equation}h_{v,\eta}(x)= d(x,\gamma_v\cap\gamma_x) - d(v,\gamma_x\cap\gamma_v).\end{equation}.
elements.sent-2411-621: The horocyclic product of ${d+1}$ trees $H^{d+1 (T)$ is the flag complex with vertex set \begin{equation}\setcon{(v_0,\ldots,v_d)\in (VT)^{n}}{\sum_{i=0}^d h_{v,\eta}(v_i)=0}\end{equation} and $1$-simplices $(v_0,\ldots,v_d)(v'_0,\ldots,v'_d)$ whenever there exist $0\leq i <j\leq d$ such that $v_iv'_i,v_jv_j'\in ET$ and $v_k=v'_k$ for all $k\neq i,j$.}
